summary: Iteration 20 - Comprehensive testing of Phase A/B/C features: Payment & Check Run System, Admin Portal, Audit Logs, Rx Rules Engine, Groups Auto-Adjust Tiers, EOB/EOP PDFs, and IDR Tracking. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed Payment Center (3 tabs) and Admin Portal (4 tabs) working correctly with full traceability end-to-end.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic issue, charts still render correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 tested all Phase A/B/C features. Payment Center has 3 tabs (Payments, Batch Run, Reversals) with 4 payments totaling $209.30. Admin Portal has 4 tabs (Users, TPAs, Audit Log, Traceability) with 9 users, 20 groups, 7 plans, 25 members, 28 claims, 4 TPAs, 4 payments. Traceability shows full lifecycle chain with audit trail. All Rx rules endpoints working (GLP-1 classification for J3490 returns Ozempic correctly). EOB/EOP PDFs generate valid PDF files. IDR tracking updates claims correctly. Previous iterations 16-19 covered SFTP, Funding, Check Runs, Wells Fargo integration, Data Tiering, Report Packages, AI Provider Agent, and Plan Builder.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/payments/summary - Returns payment summary (4 payments, $209.30 total)
POST /api/payments/batch - Creates payment batch for approved claims
GET /api/payments/reconciliation - Returns claims vs payments reconciliation
GET /api/admin/portal-roles - Returns 5 portal roles (admin, tpa_admin, mgu_admin, carrier_viewer, analytics_viewer)
GET /api/admin/system-overview - Returns system counts (9 users, 20 groups, 7 plans, 25 members, 28 claims, 4 TPAs, 4 payments)
GET /api/admin/traceability/{claim_id} - Returns full lifecycle chain (Plan → Group → Member → Claim → Payment)
GET /api/audit-logs - Returns filtered audit logs with pagination
GET /api/audit-logs/summary - Returns summary by action type
GET /api/plans/rx-rules/template - Returns Rx rules template with 5 formulary tiers
GET /api/plans/rx-rules/classify?hcpcs_code=J3490 - Classifies GLP-1 drug (Ozempic) correctly as tier4_specialty
POST /api/groups/{group_id}/auto-adjust-tiers - Auto-adjusts enrollment tiers based on dependent count

components_tested: Payment Center page loads with data-testid
3 tabs present: Payments, Batch Run, Reversals
Batch create form with Payment Method and Funding Source dropdowns
Reversal form with Payment ID and Reason inputs
Admin Portal page loads with data-testid
System overview section with 7 metric cards
4 tabs present: Users, TPAs, Audit Log, Traceability
Create User form with role selection
Traceability section with claim input and trace button
Traceability result shows full lifecycle chain with audit trail
Admin Portal link visible in sidebar
